text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as the Arima Kinen and Special Week's
matchup against Grass Wonder draws near...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set aside some time to strategize by studying
racing footage of Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've rounded corner number four and it's Grass
Wonder on the outside! Here comes Grass
Wonder! Grass Wonder! She did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
choice_data_list: What's the matter, Spe?
What's the matter, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go for a run!
choice_data_list: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week suddenly gets up and rushes out of
the room!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is running laps around the track
with a desperate look in her eyes, almost as if
she's being chased.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she's already finished our scheduled training
for the day.
choice_data_list: You're pushing yourself too hard, Spe!
You're pushing yourself too hard, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Leave me alone.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm not good enough yet. You gotta let me run!
choice_data_list: You need to stop!
You need to stop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without thinking, I step in front of Special Week
to keep her from running.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What are you doing, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Don't you know that standing in front of a
running Umamusume is like jumping in front of
traffic!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna end up getting hurt if you don't
move!
choice_data_list: I'm still not going to let you pass!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Why not?!
choice_data_list: Because I'm your trainer!
Because I'm your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Trainer...
choice_data_list:
Talk to me! You don't have to shoulder it all on
your own.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... sob...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week collapses in a heap on the track
and begins to cry for a while...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer... I... I said some horrible things
to you.
choice_data_list:
Did you panic after watching the footage of
Grass Wonder?

Did you panic after watching the footage of
Grass Wonder?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's exactly what happened.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I always knew that Grass was a force to be
reckoned with.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But actually watching the footage... It made me
really realize that I'm about to go head-to-head
with her...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Her speed, her stamina, the timing of her moves...
When you look at it, it's all so perfect...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And it made me realize that I'm no match for her.
She'd wipe the floor with me right now!
choice_data_list: I happen to disagree.
I happen to disagree.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...How can you be so sure?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There are so many racers in the Twinkle Series
who are faster, stronger, or more talented than
me!
choice_data_list: Because you're the one I chose!
Because you're the one I chose!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh...
choice_data_list:
And you're the one I've been standing side by
side with this whole time.

And you're the one I've been standing side by
side with this whole time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You've always... been by my side...
choice_data_list: You ran so well at the Japanese Derby.
You ran so well at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
choice_data_list: And you were amazing in the spring Tenno Sho!
And you were amazing in the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
choice_data_list:
So I know you'll be fine at the Arima Kinen as
well.

So I know you'll be fine at the Arima Kinen as
well.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...You really do believe in me, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...And you think that my dream can become a
reality.
choice_data_list: I've believed in you right from the start.
I've believed in you right from the start.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...That's right. You have. Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna call it a day. It's time to go home, eat,
and sleep like a log.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And then I'll be able to give it my all again
tomorrow! I'm gonna keep running, until I become
the top Umamusume in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's big smile still has the same sparkle
as it did when I first met her.
